purpose: Full skincare routine or product range arranged in flat lay or tiered pedestal composition — communicates brand completeness and routine steps.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Premium skincare product lineup photography, {product_count} skincare products from {brand_descriptor} arranged in {composition_style} — flat lay top-down or tiered pedestal row, {product_types} including cleanser, toner, serum, moisturizer, SPF, products arranged in step-order suggesting morning or evening routine, {brand_color_palette} backdrop or surface, soft diffused studio lighting — no harsh shadows, slight reflective surface creating mirror-image effect below products, {hero_product} given dominant placement, hyper-realistic glass, pump, and packaging material detail, premium clinical-meets-luxury aesthetic, shot on 50mm at f/8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: harsh side shadows
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Saudi adaptation guidance: Skincare routines are extremely popular in Saudi women's content. Halal certification and cruelty-free messaging are increasingly important for Saudi skincare brands. SPF products require particular visibility due to Saudi sun awareness campaigns. Reference image: Required (actual product bottles). Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week for skincare brands. Compliance level: standard.
